LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL PIRRAGLIA'S MOTION TO QUASH DEFENDANTS SUBPOENA TO HOPMONK HOLDINGS LLC REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST CHINA LIVE LLC AND SHANE ANDERIES ESQ. THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO QUASH DEFENDANTS' SUBPOENA TO HOPMOND HOLDINGS IS DENIED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE TERMS OF A PROPOSED PROTECTIVE ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

REPLY TO MSJ (TRANSACTION ID # 200018041) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHINA LIVE, LLC

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-19-2020 HEARING HELD RE: DEFENDANT CHINA LIVE, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULLING: MATTER IS OFF CALENDAR. DEFENDANT DID NOT SERVE NOTICE OF THE MOTION AT LEAST 75 DAYS BEFORE THE TIME APPOINTED FOR THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 437C(A)(2). (SEE ROBINSON V. WOODS (2008) 168 CAL.APP.4TH 1258, 1262-1264 [TRIAL COURTS DO NOT HAVE AUTHORITY TO SHORTEN THE MINIMUM NOTICE PERIOD FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT HEARINGS ABSENT THE EXPRESS CONSENT OF THE PARTIES].) FURTHER, THE NOTICED HEARING DATE IS LESS THAN 30 DAYS BEFORE THE DATE OF THE TRIAL, IN VIOLATION OF SECTION 437C(A)(3). (SEE ID. AT 1268 [ABSENT A FINDING OF GOOD CAUSE TO HEAR THE MOTION WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE TRIAL DATE, WHICH MUST BE MADE BEFORE THE MOTION IS FILED, NOTICE OF HEARING WAS INVALID].) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHINA LIVE, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR ALTERNTATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MATTER CALLED, ARGUMENT IS HELD. THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM. (302/EPS) *** AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT ENTERED THE FOLLOWING RULING: DEFENDANT CHINA LIVE, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AND DENIED AS TO THE FIRST AND THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE ORDER FILED THIS DATE FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING.) ***

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alterntatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Ramsey Hanafi, Esq. of Quintana Hanafi LLP, 415.504.3121, for Plaintiff Michael Pirraglia;
Atty. Shane Anderies, Esq. of Anderies & Gomes LLP, 415.217.8802, for Defendant China Live LLC.

DEFENDANT CHINA LIVE, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alterntatively, Summary Adjudication.

Matter called, ARGUMENT is held. At the conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

** After the hearing, the Court entered the following ruling: Defendant China Live, LLC's motion for summary judgment is denied. Summary adjudication is granted as to the second cause of action and denied as to the first and third cause of action. Order signed. (See order filed this date for the Court's complete ruling.) **

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2020 Continued To May-03-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alterntatively, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-19-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. RAMSEY HANAFI, Esq. of Quintana Hanafi LLP (Tel: 415-504-3121) for Plaintiff Michael Pirraglia;
Atty. SHANE K. ANDERIES, Esq. of Anderies & Gomes LLP (Tel: 415-217-8802)
for Defendant China Live, LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CHINA LIVE, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative rulling:

Matter is off calendar. Defendant did not serve notice of the motion at least 75 days before the time appointed for the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 437c(a)(2). (See Robinson v. Woods (2008) 168 Cal.App.4th 1258, 1262-1264 [trial courts do not have authority to shorten the minimum notice period for summary judgment hearings absent the express consent of the parties].) Further, the noticed hearing date is less than 30 days before the date of the trial, in violation of section 437c(a)(3). (See id. at 1268 [absent a finding of good cause to hear the motion within 30 days of the trial date, which must be made before the motion is filed, notice of hearing was invalid].)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Defendants Subpoena To Anthony Pirraglia Request For Sanctions Against China Live Llc And Shane Anderies Esq
Off Calendar Oct-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL PIRRAGLIA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Defendants Subpoena To Anthony Pirraglia Request For Sanctions Against China Live Llc And Shane Anderies Esq is denied. I adopt the judge pro tem's thorough and well-reasoned report and recommendation. Defendant China Live, LLC's stated reasons to depose plaintiff's former business partner (and father) are sufficient justification for inquiry. To the extent privacy issues are implicated, the August 27, 2020 protective order in this case shall apply to discovery obtained from Anthony Pirraglia. Sanctions are denied.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the adopted ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
